checks.expected_outcome: tabs do not clip; main content does not overflow horizontally
checks.implementation: page.tsx main element uses 'p-3 sm:p-6 max-w-full overflow-x-hidden'; tab nav uses 'overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap'

checks.expected_outcome: blocker / failed-eval list scrolls inside its panel; does not push content off-screen
checks.implementation: Diagnostics tab panels use overflow-auto with bounded max-h

checks.expected_outcome: graph node truncates long purpose text; full purpose visible only in inspector
checks.implementation: Inspector renders purpose; node card surfaces only acronym + status badge

checks.expected_outcome: graph remains readable; root cause + propagation panel still legible on mobile
checks.implementation: Explain panel uses simple textual output; works at narrow widths

checks.expected_outcome: horizontal SVG fits via viewBox; controls remain reachable
checks.implementation: SystemTrustGraph SVG uses viewBox + w-full h-auto; controls in TrustGraphSection use flex-wrap

checks.description: graph still answers top question in 10 seconds
checks.expected_outcome: Top 3 panel and Explain System State are visible without scrolling on the Overview tab on mobile
checks.implementation: Top 3 panel is the third Overview panel; Explain panel is fifth; both render with concise per-card layout

remaining_risks: Explicit fit/scroll mode toggle is not yet implemented; reliance on the SVG viewBox + horizontal scroll fallback. Tracked for a follow-up bundle.
fix_summary: Mobile pass eliminates horizontal overflow at the page level and keeps the Overview tab usable at iPhone widths. Inspector remains the destination for verbose source text.
